name: China
summary: Day 75 of Hormuz blockade / Trump 1-week clock Day 6/7. **A1 TRUMP DEPARTED WASHINGTON FOR BEIJING LATE MAY 12 DECLARING HE 'DOES NOT NEED XI'S HELP' ON IRAN — pre-summit posture HARDENED vs May 6-10 pulse-test phase that floated cooperation language on Chinese leverage on Tehran. Al Jazeera + NPR led with 'doesn't need Xi'; PBS NewsHour + CSIS framed both leaders as 'intent on keeping the Iran war from overshadowing the summit' = itself a DOWNGRADE from prior Chatham House 'can progress be made on Iran' framing. 12+ US CEOs (Tim Cook, Elon Musk) travelling = TRADE-AND-TARIFFS CENTRE OF GRAVITY, not Iran.** Trump arrives evening May 13; summit May 14-15. **B1 OFAC ECONOMIC FURY EXTENDED — Treasury formally signalled prepared secondary sanctions on FIVE CHINESE TEAPOT REFINERIES (Hengli Petrochemical Dalian, Shandong Jincheng, Hebei Xinhai, Shouguang Luqing, Shandong Shengxing); CHINA MOFCOM MAY 2 ISSUED PROHIBITION ORDER UNDER BLOCKING RULES — FIRST FORMAL CHINESE LEGAL COUNTERMEASURE TO US SANCTIONS — barring recognition, enforcement or compliance inside China with US sanctions on those five refineries** (CONFIRMED — Treasury primary + MOFCOM order text + Holland & Knight + Baker McKenzie corroboration). Sanctions architecture shifting from 'secondary risk' to 'explicit legal collision' — raises cost for any Chinese intermediary doing parallel US-and-Iran business. For Indian importers and remaining Iranian-oil-shadow-trade pathways, raises bar on PRC re-export financing — a non-obvious cascade through Indian PSU oil refining. Trump arrives Beijing day after the Blocking Rules invocation — Chinese have public legal ground prepared. **A11 IRAN FM ARAGHCHI ARRIVES NEW DELHI MAY 13 FOR BRICS FM MEETING MAY 14-15 — ARAGHCHI WILL SIT AT BRICS TABLE WITH CHINESE FM WHILE TRUMP IS IN BEIJING signalling China-Iran direct alignment** (CONFIRMED — Iran Embassy + Indian press). Xinhua/Global Times SILENT on OFAC tranche and the China Blocking Rules — Chinese state press letting the legal action speak rather than commenting on it. USD/CNY 6.79 (-0.1% 1D, PBOC stability into summit) supports China-demand proxies — Cu +2.5%, Ag +2.6% same session = traders LONG China-reflation, SHORT war-premium-supply (Al -2.4%). Shanghai Composite 4,237.83 (+0.6% 1D, +6.8% 1M); Hang Seng 26,304.78 (-0.2% 1D). **The summit Iran agenda has been publicly downgraded: Trump's 'doesn't need Xi' line + CSIS framing 'intent on keeping Iran from overshadowing summit' = expectation set on Iran progress materially LOWER than last weekend.** Tasnim's Velayati Trump-Xi summit-timed jab from May 9-11 still operative ('never imagine you will enter Beijing triumphantly'). Iran framing Beijing summit as moment of Iranian leverage, not weakness. PRIOR FRAMING: Russia-China energy lifeline; Iran is ~13% of China imports; >50% of Chinese energy transits Hormuz. — Trump departs May 13 afternoon for Beijing summit with Xi; Iran on agenda; Trump will press Xi on China's financial support for Iran and 'dual-use goods.' Per Bloomberg sources, a major Iran military decision is unlikely before departure. China previously gave Sec Def Hegseth assurance (April 16) NOT to send weapons to Iran. The pause window (May 13 afternoon → May 15-16) coincides exactly with Trump 1-week clock close (May 14), effectively MEANING the clock-close CANNOT trigger an immediate kinetic response** (CONFIRMED — Bloomberg primary, SCMP, PBS, Al Jazeera, CNBC). **B7 NEW OFAC SANCTIONS WAVE MAY 11-12 PRIMARILY TARGETS IRAN→CHINA OIL CHAIN: 12 entities (4 Hong Kong, 4 UAE, 1 Oman) + 3 individuals over IRGC Shaid Purja'fari oil HQ + Golden Globe Turkey-cover company facilitating Iranian oil sales to China; builds on July 2025 Golden Globe designations** (CONFIRMED — Treasury primary). Treasury Sec Bessent: continue using sanctions to deprive Iran funding; May 12 designations added Iranian nuclear research with military applications. Real financial action (secondary-sanctions risk for downstream Chinese and Gulf intermediaries). USD/CNY 6.79 (-0.1% 1D, -0.5% 1M, -1.7% 3M) — no current weaponization risk priced; if Trump-Xi summit fails on Iran/dual-use issue, USD/CNY could break 6.85+. Shanghai Composite 4,208.73 (-0.4% 1D, +5.3% 1M); Hang Seng 26,367.49 (-0.1% 1D). China May trade-data weakness contributes to Aluminum LME -2.3% counter-narrative (China property + global industrial moderation). **Xinhua/Global Times SILENT on OFAC sanctions tranche** (commercial reasons — China is primary buyer of Iranian oil with secondary-sanctions exposure). TASS/Pravda silent on WSJ UAE-Lavan story. Tasnim's Velayati (Iran Supreme Leader adviser) Trump-Xi summit-timed jab: 'Mr. Trump, never imagine that by taking advantage of Iran's calm, you will be able to enter Beijing triumphantly.' Iran framing Beijing summit as moment of Iranian leverage, not weakness. PRIOR FRAMING: Russia offered China energy lifeline (April 15) — pipeline + rail alternatives reduce but do not replace Hormuz exposure. Iran is ~13% of China imports; >50% of Chinese energy transits Hormuz.

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP DEPARTED FOR BEIJING LATE MAY 12 DECLARING HE 'DOES NOT NEED XI'S HELP' ON IRAN — pre-summit posture hardened vs May 6-10 pulse-test; PBS+CSIS frame both leaders 'intent on keeping Iran war from overshadowing summit' = expectation DOWNGRADE; 12+ US CEOs (Cook, Musk) travelling = trade-and-tariffs centre of gravity. Summit May 14-15. **B1 OFAC ECONOMIC FURY EXTENDED — Treasury formally signalled prepared secondary sanctions on FIVE CHINESE TEAPOT REFINERIES (Hengli Petrochemical Dalian, Shandong Jincheng, Hebei Xinhai, Shouguang Luqing, Shandong Shengxing); CHINA MOFCOM MAY 2 ISSUED PROHIBITION ORDER UNDER BLOCKING RULES = FIRST FORMAL CHINESE LEGAL COUNTERMEASURE to US sanctions** (Holland & Knight + Baker McKenzie corroboration). Sanctions architecture shifting from 'secondary risk' to 'explicit legal collision.' **A11 IRAN FM ARAGHCHI ARRIVES NEW DELHI MAY 13 FOR BRICS FM MEETING MAY 14-15** — Araghchi sits at BRICS table with Chinese FM WHILE Trump is in Beijing = China-Iran direct alignment signal. Xinhua + Global Times SILENT on OFAC tranche + Blocking Rules — Chinese state press letting legal action speak rather than commenting. USD/CNY 6.79 (-0.1% 1D, PBOC stability into summit); Shanghai Composite 4,237.83 (+0.6% 1D, +6.8% 1M); Hang Seng 26,304.78 (-0.2% 1D). Cu +2.5%, Ag +2.6% same session = traders pricing 'trade-not-war' Trump-Xi summit reflation bid in industrial metals.
sources: Al Jazeera 'Trump downplays US-Iran differences as he heads to Beijing'
NPR 'Trump goes to China as Iran war smolders'
US Treasury OFAC press releases primary
Juan Cole 'Can China use its Huge Economy to Break US Iran Sanctions?'
Iran Embassy New Delhi primary (Araghchi BRICS visit)
recent_signals.verification: Trump Beijing departure + 'doesn't need Xi' = CONFIRMED ACTION + RHETORIC multi-source primary; OFAC five-refinery prepared sanctions + MOFCOM Blocking Rules order = CONFIRMED (Treasury + MOFCOM primary + legal analysts independent corroboration); Araghchi BRICS visit = CONFIRMED (Iran Embassy primary + Indian press); Chinese state press silence on OFAC + Blocking Rules = CONFIRMED ABSENCE (Xinhua / Global Times).

historical_summaries.summary: 4 signals. Chinese MFA spokesperson: attack and killing of Khamenei is 'grave violation of sovereignty | China provided missile spare parts, advanced radar systems, BeiDou-3 encrypted navigation for Iranian military, satellite intelligence suppo

10 signals. China is a NET BENEFICIARY of the crisis: (1) Manufacturing PMI 50 | China positioning as potential peace broker per CNN — Beijing moving from posturing to possible active mediation, which would be a major geo | China is net beneficiary of crisis (discounted Russian/Iranian crude)
